servinfo.title: Precautions for Body, Cab and Accessories

servinfosub.title: Precautions for Electrical Circuit Service
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for Electrical Circuit Service .

servinfosub.title: Precautions for Vehicle Equipped with Supplemental Restraint (Air Bag) System
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for Vehicle Equipped with Supplemental Restraint (Air Bag) System .

servinfosub.title: Reassembling Note for Wiring Harness
servinfosub.ptxt: Be sure to observe Reassembling Note for Wiring Harness whenever installing wiring harness. Otherwise, electrical trouble may occur.

servinfosub.title: Precautions for CAN Communication System
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for CAN Communication System .

servinfosub.title: Precautions for Discharge Headlight Service
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for Discharge Headlight Service .

servinfosub.title: Precautions for Headlight Auto Leveling System Service
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for Headlight Auto Leveling System Service .

servinfosub.title: Precautions for Working on Glass
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to Precautions for Working on Glass .

item.ptxt: Observe the following or memorized diagnosis code may be deleted.
Do not disconnect the system connector.
Do not disconnect negative (–) cable at the battery.
Do not disconnect the system grounding.
Do not disconnect the system fuse.
Do not set ignition OFF during troubleshooting.
Before using scan tool, read its “Operator’s (Instruction) Manual” to know how to use it.
Be sure to clear all DTCs after completing troubleshooting.
